node: Apostolic faith churches and what makes them imperial to others.
historical_parallel: The Council of Nicaea (325 AD) and its impact on the spread of Christianity
era_resolution: Establishment of doctrine through ecumenical councils
modern_resolution: Inclusivity, diverse perspectives, and decentralized governance to mitigate imperial tendencies

biblical_tie.context: Jesus' teaching on servant leadership and the rejection of worldly authority

protocol: Promote dialogue, acknowledge historical power imbalances, and foster servant leadership within Apostolic faith communities
